channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Scientists expected a black hole but found a neutrino factory powered by stars
item.description: A distant galaxy called Shadow Blaster may be a surprising source of cosmic neutrinos: extreme star formation, not a supermassive ...

item.title: This giant tropical fruit could help reverse gum disease damage
item.description: A new biomaterial made from jackfruit latex, pomegranate peel, and simvastatin could transform severe gum disease treatment. Early tests sugges...

item.title: Researchers devise Wordle strategy with 99% success rate
item.description: A Wordle-solving strategy developed by researchers achieves 99% success by prioritizing information gain over likely answers. The method uses...

item.title: Scientists reprogram brain immune cells to combat Alzheimer's
item.description: A newly identified molecule, OLE, helped restore brain immune cells to a protective state in Alzheimer's models. The treatment reduced...
